ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path for the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the image capture location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the image capture location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the image capture location */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date the image was captured */,
  "camera_settings" TEXT /* Camera settings used during image capture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image being analyzed */,
  "perimeter" REAL /* Calculated perimeter of the identified object */,
  "area" REAL /* Calculated area of the identified object */,
  "circularity" REAL /* Circularity metric of the identified object */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis result (e.g., Regular, Irregular) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, agronomist) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis method (e.g., Edge Detection) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis method */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Common name of the crop */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the crop */,
  "growth_stage" TEXT /* Current growth stage of the crop (e.g., germination, flowering) */,
  "water_requirements" TEXT /* Water requirements for the crop */,
  "sunlight_requirements" TEXT /* Sunlight requirements for the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_analysis" (
  "crop_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop analysis relationship */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop being analyzed */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_analysis_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_analysis_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_category_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image linked to a category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category linked to the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_category_links_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES image_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_category_links_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., upload, view, delete) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the image (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing setting */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used for processing */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_settings_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Description of training data used */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Date the model was last trained */,
  "model_framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model making the prediction */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being analyzed */,
  "prediction_result" TEXT /* Result of the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES model_training ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result related to the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural practice */,
  "practice_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural practice */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agricultural practice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_agricultural_practices" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image linked to an agricultural practice */,
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agricultural practice linked to the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_agricultural_practices_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_agricultural_practices_practice_id FOREIGN KEY ("practice_id") REFERENCES agricultural_practices ("practice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop health metric */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop being analyzed */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop health metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the crop health metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_health_metrics_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)
